name: Santa  Collecting gifts
description: Get ready for the ultimate Christmas adventure in Santa Collecting gifts, a fast-paced holiday arcade game where your mission is to help Santa collect as many gifts as possible — while avoiding explosive surprises! The snowy skies are full of falling presents and dangerous bombs. Use your keyboard arrows or WASD keys to guide Santa across the frosty night sky in his sleigh. Catch colorful gift boxes to earn points and spread the holiday cheer — but watch out for the bombs! One wrong move, and you’ll lose a life. Enjoy beautiful winter visuals, real jingle bell background music, and a snowfall animation that brings Christmas magic to life. As you progress, the falling speed of gifts and bombs gradually increases, making every second more exciting and challenging. Lose all three lives, and it’s game over — but don’t worry! You can restart anytime and try to beat your best score. With smooth controls, relaxing festive music, and joyful gameplay, Santa Gift Rush is the perfect
instructions: Move Santa Arrow Keys or WASD
